prompt: Generate an isolated icon representing a data network node with flowing lines. Use the distinct comic-angular style, thick outlines, and green/white flat color palette from the reference image.
searchQueryGenerated: Flat design information graphics icons set white background
prompt_refined: Generate an isolated icon depicting a data network node with dynamic, flowing lines. The icon must adhere to the distinct comic-angular style, featuring prominent thick black outlines and a flat color palette of teal green and white, as exemplified by the icons in image 1.
